steps.title: Find the slope from two table points
steps.content:
Using $(0, 12)$ and $(1, 19)$ from the table:
$$m = \frac{\Delta y}{\Delta x} = \frac{19 - 12}{1 - 0} = 7$$

steps.title: Write the linear equation
steps.content: The point $(0, 12)$ is on the line, so the y-intercept is $b = 12$. The line is $y = 7x + 12$.

steps.title: Verify with the third point
steps.content:
Check $(2, 26)$: $y = 7(2) + 12 = 14 + 12 = 26$. ✓

The y-coordinate of the y-intercept is 12.
